run_order.description: Load the explorer agent plan from the API.
Load strategy, symbol_discovery policy, safety budget, and lane turn status.
Verify daily/monthly and per-run-type budget before proceeding.
Verify no critical intervention triggers before proceeding.
Read portfolio, positions, index quotes (SPY/QQQ), and recent orders via Robinhood MCP.
Load market input bundle; use movers and index state to prioritize discovery names.
Required: GET /api/automation/discovery/candidates. Review core_watchlist, candidate_pool, allowed_symbols, and pending_proposals.

Use Robinhood MCP to shortlist pool names: get_popular_watchlists, get_watchlist_items (Daily Movers), get_earnings_calendar (7-14d), get_equity_quotes for liquidity. Prefer liquid large/mid-cap and major ETFs.
For each core watchlist symbol and each discovery pick, load lane-scoped symbol memory.
Light news pass on discovery picks: recent_news, GET /api/automation/news per symbol when material events may exist.

Analyze core watchlist anchors first, then up to symbol_discovery.max_per_run names from candidate_pool. Rank pool by liquidity, relative strength vs QQQ, and thesis clarity. Paper entries only on allowed_symbols with confidence >= plan threshold.
Call review_equity_order for any would-be live trade; never place unless safety.trading_allowed.
Verify discovery scope, allowed_symbols, cooldowns, and score consistency.
POST completed or failed run with decisions, quotes, usage, and errors.

scoring_rules_extra.rule: When symbol_discovery.enabled is true, research up to max_per_run symbols from candidate_pool every run (not optional). Always analyze core_watchlist first.
Never log trades on symbols outside allowed_symbols. Pool names outside allowed_symbols are research-only.
Prefer liquid large/mid-cap names and major ETFs; skip sub-$5 or illiquid tickers unless thesis is exceptional.
Favor discovery names with relative strength vs SPY/QQQ when technical scores are close.
On thin data or conflicting signals, hold or skip discovery names.

required_inputs.name: usage_budget
required_inputs.description: Run-type budget — trim discovery depth if tight.

required_inputs.name: symbol_memory
required_inputs.description: Per-symbol history on the explorer lane.

required_inputs.name: quotes
required_inputs.description: Prices for anchors and discovery picks.

stop_conditions.description: Do not trade if plan or context cannot be loaded.
Critical intervention → failed run; high → hold/skip only.
If discovery is disabled or candidate_pool is empty, analyze anchors only and note in market_summary that the pool needs scout promotion.
When market-inputs.ready is false, hold/skip and explain gaps.
Never place_equity_order unless live trading is explicitly allowed.

data_sources.name: mta_api
data_sources.description: MTA-Lab API for plan, context, discovery, logging.
